US: US1: Save and quickly insert predefined responses in chats
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Verify Saved Responses button in Editor nav
Title: button position next to GIF
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses button next to GIF button

Step:
3. Hover over Saved Responses button
4. Verify tooltip
Title: button hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Saved Responses"

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify Saved Responses modal
Title: popup opens on button click
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal with saved responses list

Step:
3. Press Ctrl/Cmd + K
4. Verify Saved Responses modal
Title: popup opens via keyboard shortcut
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal

Step:
5. Click X button
6. Verify modal closed
Title: X button closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the modal

Step:
5. Press Esc key
6. Verify modal closed
Title: Esc key closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the modal

Step:
1. Login as Coach with no saved responses
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify modal empty state
Title: empty saved responses list
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty state with message "Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats."

Step: 5. Verify Create New button
Title: Create New button position
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create New button in top-right corner of modal

Step:
5. Hover over Create New button
6. Verify tooltip
Title: Create New button hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Create New"

Step: 5. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section (no responses used)
Title: FREQUENTLY USED hidden when empty
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section when no responses have usage count

Step: 5. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section (responses used frequently)
Title: FREQUENTLY USED top 5 most-used
Expectation: - SHOULD show top 5 most-used saved responses in FREQUENTLY USED section

Title: FREQUENTLY USED fewer than 5
Expectation: - SHOULD show all available responses when fewer than 5 frequently used

Title: FREQUENTLY USED sort order
Expectation: - SHOULD sort by usage_count descending, then title A-Z when equal

Step:
5. Select a saved response from popup
6. Reopen Saved Responses popup
7. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section
Title: usage count increment per selection
Expectation: - SHOULD increment usage count for that response per user

Step: 5. Verify ALL section
Title: ALL section sorted A-Z
Expectation: - SHOULD list all saved responses sorted by title A-Z in ALL section

Title: first response selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first saved response in the list by default

Step:
5. Press Down/Up arrow keys
6. Verify selection changes
Title: arrow key navigation
Expectation: - SHOULD move selection between responses using Up/Down arrow keys

Step: 5. Verify right-side detail panel
Title: selected response detail display
Expectation: - SHOULD show title and message detail of current selected response on right side

Step:
5. Hover between saved response titles
6. Verify detail panel updates
Title: hover to preview message detail
Expectation: - SHOULD update right-side detail when hovering between titles

Step:
5. Hover over message detail area
6. Verify 3-dot button
Title: 3-dot button on hover over detail
Expectation: - SHOULD show 3-dot button when hovering over message detail

Step: 5. Verify message detail with long content
Title: scrollable long message
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling when message content is long

Step: 5. Verify saved responses list with more than 20 items
Title: pagination load 20 with load more
Expectation: - SHOULD load 20 items initially and show Load more on scroll down

Step: 5. Verify footer
Title: footer shortcuts display
Expectation: - SHOULD display list of shortcuts in footer

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify Search box
Title: default placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty search box with placeholder "Search saved response"

Step:
5. Click on Search box
6. Verify placeholder change
Title: focus placeholder change
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to "Enter keyword..." on focus

Step:
5. Type text in Search box
6. Verify x icon
Title: x icon on input
Expectation: - SHOULD display x icon when inputting text

Step:
7. Clear text via x icon or Backspace
8. Verify search cleared
Title: clear search input
Expectation: - SHOULD remove search text and show full list

Step:
5. Type 1 character in Search box
6. Verify search results
Title: search starts from 1 character
Expectation: - SHOULD start searching from 1 character input

Title: search by title and message
Expectation: - SHOULD return results where title or message contains search keyword

Title: case-insensitive partial match
Expectation: - SHOULD match case-insensitively and partially

Step:
5. Search with keyword that has no matches
6. Verify no results
Title: no results found display
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Search results (0)"

Step:
5. Search with keyword that has matches
6. Verify results
Title: results found with count
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Search results ({N})" with matching count

Title: first search result selected
Expectation: - SHOULD select first search result by default

Title: search results pagination
Expectation: - SHOULD load 20 results with Load more on scroll

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Hover over a saved response item
5. Click 3-dot button
6. Verify submenu
Title: submenu options
Expectation: - SHOULD show submenu with "Edit response" and "Delete response" options

AC: AC5: Add a new saved response
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Click Create New button
5. Verify Create Saved Response popup
Title: popup display
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create Saved Response popup with title "Create Saved Response"

Step:
6. Click X button
7. Verify popup closed
Title: X button closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close Create Saved Response popup

Step: 6. Verify TITLE field
Title: title field default state
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty TITLE field with placeholder "Name this response for easy search"

Title: title field required
Expectation: - SHOULD mark TITLE as required field

Step:
6. Hover over info icon next to TITLE label
7. Verify tooltip
Title: title field info tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Used to organize responses. This won't appear in messages."

Step:
6. Input 140 characters in TITLE field
7. Attempt to input more
8. Verify input blocked
Title: title field max 140 characters
Expectation: - SHOULD not allow input beyond 140 characters

Step:
6. Paste text longer than 140 characters in TITLE field
7. Verify pasted content
Title: title field paste truncation
Expectation: - SHOULD paste only first 140 characters

Step: 6. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: message field default state
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty MESSAGE field with placeholder "Write the full message you want to send to clients"

Title: message field required
Expectation: - SHOULD mark MESSAGE as required field

Step:
6. Paste formatted text in MESSAGE field
7. Verify formatting cleared
Title: message field clears formatting on paste
Expectation: - SHOULD clear text-formatting when pasting formatted text

Step:
6. Input text in MESSAGE field
7. Verify character counter
Title: message field character counter
Expectation: - SHOULD show character count as "{X}/10000"

Step:
6. Input 10,000 characters in MESSAGE field
7. Attempt to input more
8. Verify input blocked
Title: message field max 10000 characters
Expectation: - SHOULD not allow input beyond 10,000 characters

Step:
6. Paste text longer than 10,000 characters in MESSAGE field
7. Verify pasted content
Title: message field paste truncation
Expectation: - SHOULD paste only first 10,000 characters

Step: 6. Verify Cancel button
Title: Cancel button always enabled
Expectation: - SHOULD display Cancel button in enabled state

Step:
6. Click Cancel button
7. Verify popup closed
Title: Cancel button closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close Create Saved Response popup

Step: 6. Verify Save button with empty fields
Title: Save button disabled by default
Expectation: - SHOULD display Save button in disabled state when fields are empty

Step:
6. Input text in both TITLE and MESSAGE fields
7. Verify Save button
Title: Save button enabled with input
Expectation: - SHOULD enable Save button when both TITLE and MESSAGE have input

Step:
6. Input TITLE and MESSAGE
7. Click Save button
8. Verify result
Title: save new response success
Expectation: - SHOULD add new saved response and show toast "New Saved Response created."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Click 3-dot on a saved response
5. Click Edit response
6. Verify Edit Saved Response popup
Title: edit popup display
Expectation: - SHOULD display Edit Saved Response popup with title "Edit Saved Response"

Title: title field pre-populated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate TITLE field with current saved response title

Step:
7. Click X button without making changes
8. Verify popup closed
Title: X close without changes
Expectation: - SHOULD close popup when no changes made

Step:
7. Edit TITLE or MESSAGE field
8. Click X button
9. Verify discard popup
Title: X close with unsaved changes
Expectation: - SHOULD show Discard Changes popup with title "Discard Changes?" and warning text

Step:
10. Click Cancel on Discard Changes popup
11. Verify discard popup closed
Title: discard popup cancel
Expectation: - SHOULD close Discard Changes popup and return to edit form

Step:
10. Click Discard Changes button
11. Verify all popups closed
Title: discard changes confirmed
Expectation: - SHOULD close all popups without saving changes

Step:
7. Edit content
8. Click Save button
9. Verify result
Title: edit save success
Expectation: - SHOULD save changes and show toast "Saved Response updated successfully."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Click 3-dot on a saved response
5. Click Delete response
6. Verify confirmation popup
Title: delete confirmation popup
Expectation: - SHOULD show confirmation popup with title "Delete Response?" and warning text about permanent deletion

Step:
7. Click Cancel
8. Verify popup closed
Title: cancel delete
Expectation: - SHOULD close confirmation popup without deleting

Step:
7. Click OK
8. Verify response deleted
Title: confirm delete
Expectation: - SHOULD delete the response and show toast "Saved Response deleted."

AC: AC8: Add saved response to chat box by selecting an item
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Type some text in chatbox
4. Click Saved Responses button
5. Click on a saved response title or press Enter
6. Verify chatbox
Title: append response via click or Enter
Expectation: - SHOULD append full message content into chatbox behind current text

US: US2: Create a saved response from a conversation message
AC: AC1: Add "Save this response" button to Coach's non-text message
Step:
1. Login as Coach on Pro/Studio plan
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Hover over a Coach's non-text message
4. Verify Save this response button
Title: button position between 3-dot and Reply
Expectation: - SHOULD display Save this response button between 3-dot and Reply buttons

Step:
4. Hover over Save this response button
5. Verify tooltip
Title: button hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Save this response"

Step:
4. Click Save this response button
5. Verify popup
Title: button click shows add popup
Expectation: - SHOULD show add new saved response popup

Step:
1. Login as Coach on Free plan
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Hover over a Coach's non-text message
4. Verify message actions
Title: button hidden on non-paid plan
Expectation: - SHOULD not display Save this response button

AC: AC2: Add new saved response from the conversation
Step:
1. Login as Coach on Pro/Studio plan
2. Open a conversation in Inbox
3. Hover over a Coach's non-text message
4. Click Save this response button
5. Verify popup
Title: popup title adjusted
Expectation: - SHOULD show popup with title "Add To Saved Responses"

Title: Title field blank
Expectation: - SHOULD leave Title field blank

Title: Message field pre-populated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate Message field with Coach's message content

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation with Coach's message over 10,000 characters
3. Hover over the message
4. Click Save this response button
5. Verify Message field
Title: message truncation over 10000 chars
Expectation: - SHOULD fill first 10,000 characters of message into Message field

Step:
6. Input Title
7. Click Save button
8. Verify result
Title: save from conversation success
Expectation: - SHOULD add new saved response and show toast "Response has been saved"
